allow: Bash(wsl -e bash -lc 'cd /home/ggrace/coding-projects/extension/extension && ls -la index.html && cat index.html')
Bash(wsl -e bash -lc 'ls /usr/bin/node* 2>/dev/null || ls /usr/local/bin/node* 2>/dev/null || echo ""node not in standard paths""')
Bash(wsl -e bash -lc 'ls ~/.nvm/versions/node/ 2>/dev/null || ls /opt/node*/bin/node 2>/dev/null || which nodejs 2>/dev/null || echo ""checking PATH: $PATH""')
Bash(wsl -e bash -lc 'export PATH=$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v24.11.0/bin:$PATH && node --version && cd /home/ggrace/coding-projects/extension/extension && npm run build 2>&1')
Bash(wsl -e bash -lc 'cd /home/ggrace/coding-projects/extension/extension && rm -rf node_modules package-lock.json && npm install 2>&1')
Bash(wsl -e bash -lc "cd /home/ggrace/coding-projects/extension/extension && npm cache clean --force && rm -rf node_modules package-lock.json 2>/dev/null; echo ''done cleaning''")

Bash(wsl -e bash -lc "cd /home/ggrace/coding-projects/extension/extension && rm -rf node_modules 2>/dev/null; rm -f package-lock.json 2>/dev/null; ls -la node_modules 2>/dev/null || echo ''node_modules removed''")
Bash(wsl -e bash -lc 'cd /home/ggrace/coding-projects/extension/extension && npm_config_platform=linux npm_config_arch=x64 npm install --platform=linux --arch=x64 2>&1')
Bash(wsl -e bash -lc 'ln -sf /home/ggrace/coding-projects/extension/extension /tmp/extension && cd /tmp/extension && rm -rf node_modules package-lock.json 2>/dev/null; echo ""cleaned""')
Bash(wsl -e bash -lc 'cd /home/ggrace/coding-projects/extension/extension && PATH=$\(echo $PATH | tr : ""\\n"" | grep -v ""/mnt/c"" | tr ""\\n"" : | sed ""s/:$//""\) && npm install 2>&1')
